reasoning: The limiter in your current performance is poor lactate clearance, as seen in the 9.3% decline from your 5-minute to 20-minute power. The last ride indicates you are well recovered, priming you for focused intensity. Tackling the Alpine Loop's sustained climbs means we must enhance your ability to clear lactate while maintaining power.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 8-minute over-unders; 2 minutes at 201W, 2 minutes at 256W, repeat twice per set. 3-minute recovery spin between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
